title: Thunderbird no envía correos con Outlook/Office365: error STARTTLS smtp.office365.com
creator: farides.meneses
content:
Buenos días: Tengo más de dos semanas con este problema al enviar correos: Falló el envío del mensaje. Hubo un error mientras se enviaba el correo: No se pudo establecer una conexión segura con el servidor SMTP smtp.office365.com usando STARTTLS porque no anuncia esa funcionalidad . Deshabilita STARTTLS para ese servidor o contacta a u proveedor.

Ya contacté al proveedor, pero al parecer el correo tiene todos los permisos. Será un error de configuración o modificaciones?

Ya probé puerto 587 con STARTTLS y OAuth2, puerto 465 con SSL/TLS, borrado de credenciales, reinstalación, etc. Puedo recibir correos, pero no enviarlos. Pueden ayudarme por favor? Muchas gracias.


Good morning,

I have been experiencing this problem for more than two weeks when trying to send emails: Sending of the message failed. An error occurred while sending mail: Unable to establish a secure connection with the SMTP server smtp.office365.com using STARTTLS since it does not advertise that capability. Disable STARTTLS for that server or contact your provider.

I already contacted the provider, but apparently the email account has all permissions enabled. Could this be a configuration error or some modifications?

I have tried port 587 with STARTTLS and OAuth2, port 465 with SSL/TLS, deleting credentials, reinstalling, etc. I can receive emails, but I cannot send them.

Could you please help me? Thank you very much.

title: Unable to “Accept Permissions” after password update
creator: peanut
content:
Hi,

I am unable to get Thunderbird to work after my microsoft password was updated. I get the popup & enter my email & new password, but I never get the second popup to accept permissions. It just doesn’t go any further. I can see Failed login attempts for TB on the microsoft side. I am not too tech savvy, so I’m doing my best to troubleshoot!

This is Thunderbird 78.14.0 on mac 10.11, YES, that is old, it is a legacy mac! It was successfully setup with OAuth2 over 3 years ago & worked fine until the password update. I was able to add TB to an old 10.15 mac & it got the permissions popup & the account was added fine (but it is also using TB 150.0.2). Oddly, there was no 2FA prompts given, it just connected with my password only??

I had a number of devices that needed passwords updated, so I’m wondering if there was a conflict when trying to do this one? Do I need to delete certain files? I found where to delete the stored passwords & did that, but it’s not moving past that point to even store new ones & connect. I can’t grant permissions?

Also, I notice the successful TB login activity shows my IP address, whereas the unsuccessful one shows Browser Mozilla Firefox. I’m not sure if that helps with troubleshooting or not!

Thank you for your time!
